data.body: DONE (config-loop, commit f2a74bad). Removed the TICKET_CMD validate injection seam (dead bash-era test seam; never set in production). AC1 (no TICKET_CMD read in src; validate always in-process): validate._raw_tickets now always reads via reads.ensure_fresh + reads.list_states; deleted the os.environ.get(TICKET_CMD) subprocess branch; collapsed the two "TICKET_CMD or _default_ticket_cmd()" sites (run + validate_state) to _default_ticket_cmd() — which returns in_process_cli() and is used ONLY as the display string embedded in the interface-contract SUGGESTION (validate_checks.check_interface_contracts), never subprocessed, so removing the env override is functionally inert in production. Dropped the now-unused import subprocess; reworded the _FETCHING verbose line; updated reads._NO_PREFETCH comment. grep: no TICKET_CMD anywhere in src except a now-corrected comment. AC2 (test_validate_compute materializes/drives without TICKET_CMD; same tier/score assertions): REWROTE the test from subprocess + mock ticket bash-script (injected via TICKET_CMD) to in-process validate.run(argv, tracker) with validate._raw_tickets monkeypatched to return the synthetic fixture list. EVERY assertion preserved verbatim: score tiers (exit==5-score via run() return), JSON key set, the exact child->parent critical golden, the terse stderr golden, the colored CRITICAL + Health Score stderr goldens, usage-error exit codes, and the library/MCP shape (rebar.validate() + ValidateReportOut). DESIGN NOTE / deviation from the "materialize real stores" wording: kept the synthetic-graph fixtures deliberately — a real-store materialization could NOT reproduce the child->parent-dep critical because the write API hierarchy-promotes a child->parent blocking link up to comparable levels, neutralizing exactly that pathology; in-process issue injection is what preserves that critical-path scoring coverage (the dominant validate critical). AC3 (full suite green): 1931 passed, 9 skipped. Review: done via line-by-line original-vs-rewritten diff + 6-point checklist (subagent code-review API was returning 529 Overloaded on 3 retries); fail-closed verify gate untouched (validate is a separate subsystem). This is the last of EV-2a/b/c -> unblocks parent 77aa.
